name: Focaccia, Caramelized Onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully, placing all ingredients except Onion topping and cheeses in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer. Bake on Dough cycle.
2. Grease a cookie sheet. Pat dough into a 12-inch circle on the cookie sheet. Cover and let rise in a warm place about 30 minutes or until doubled. Prepare Onion Topping.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F. Make deep depressions in dough at 1-inch intervals with a finger or handles of a wooden spoon. Spread topping over dough. Sprinkle with cheeses.
4. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until the edges are golden brown. Remove from cookie sheet to a wire rack. Serve warm.
Onion Topping:
Melt 3 tbsp margarine or butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium-low heat. Add 2 medium onions, sliced and 2 cloves of chopped garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally until onions are brown and caramelized. Remove from heat and follow the above instructions.
